rulings.Case Title: VALERIE GORNAIA VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wendesday, June 19, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF VALERIE GORNAIA's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Plaintiff's Demurrer to Defendant's Answer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARA POWELL VS. HAWK LOU et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wendesday, June 19, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT HAWK LOU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is OVERRULED. Complaint alleges residential use of the premises pursuant to agreement with landlord (2) rendering applicability of SFRO and warranty of habitability an issue of fact not appropriate to be raised on demurrer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARA POWELL VS. HAWK LOU et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wendesday, June 19, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT HAWK LOU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant' Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts supporting request for punitive damages. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSUE HERNANDEZ et al VS. DANIEL KEW et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wendesday, June 19, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT DANIEL KEW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain. Claims for personal injury and emotional distress are not merely incidental. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/REQ)

Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wendesday, June 19, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT MARIANAH FLEMING's Demurrer to compalint. Defendant's Demurrer is OFF CALENDAR. Moving Defendant dismissed May 22, 2013. =(501/REQ)

Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wendesday, June 19, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT MARIANAH FLEMING's Motion To Strike. Defendant's Motion to Strike is OFF CALENDAR. Moving Defendant dismissed May 22, 2013. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THELMA MOORE VS. DWAINE BURGARDT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wendesday, June 19, 2013, line 5 - PLAINTIFF THELMA MOORE's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall respond to From Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request for Production of Documents. Plaintiff's request for Admissions to be deemed Admitted is GRANTED. Sanctions n the amount of $810 is granted. =(501/REQ)
